unsupported_features.comment: DOM mutation order — pipeline routes through <page> root, producing different mutation sequences
Lynx environment does not provide MutationObserver

tests: should not render falsy values
should render NaN as text content
should clear falsy attributes
should not render falsy attributes on hydrate
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify(NaN) → null — NaN is lost in BSI→patch IPC serialization

tests: should render bigint as text content
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify(BigInt) throws — BigInt cannot cross BSI→patch IPC boundary

tests: should serialize object props as attributes
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify strips custom toString() — object identity lost in IPC serialization

tests: should keep c.base up to date if a nested child component changes DOM nodes
should not update sibling c.base if child component changes DOM nodes
should not update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and it is not first child component
should update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and it is first non-null child component
should not update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and a parent is not first child component
should update parent c.base if first child becomes null
should update parent c.base if first child becomes non-null
should update parent c.base if first non-null child becomes null with multiple null siblings
should update parent c.base if a null child returns DOM with multiple null siblings
should update parent c.base to null if last child becomes null
should update parent c.base if last child returns dom
should not update parent if it is a DOM node
skip_list.comment: component.base returns BSI (background thread), not a DOM node

tests: should set enumerable boolean attribute
should allow setting contentEditable to false
should not clear falsy DOM properties
should mask value on password input elements
should not throw when changing contentEditable to undefined or null
should support subsequent renders w/ defaultValue
should support subsequent renders w/ defaultChecked
skip_list.comment: Web DOM IDL properties (value, checked, contentEditable, spellcheck, …) — Preact does dom[prop]=val but BSI has no IDL property, causing a different code path in setProperty()

tests: should not execute append operation when child is at last
should always diff `checked` and `value` properties against the DOM
skip_list.comment: Refs return BSI, not DOM node — tests call ref.focus(), ref.value, etc.

tests: is invoked after refs are set
skip_list.comment: BSI ref timing — ref callback receives BSI object (background thread), test asserts DOM node is set before componentDidMount/componentDidUpdate lifecycle hook fires

tests: should be called after children are mounted
skip_list.comment: Pipeline timing — DOM check in componentDidUpdate fires before children's main-thread patches are applied via IPC

tests: can be set by another component
should handle queued useState
skip_list.comment: setupRerender() timing — cross-component useState update triggers rerender before pipeline IPC roundtrip syncs DOM to scratch

tests: can be dispatched by another component
skip_list.comment: setupRerender() timing — cross-component useReducer dispatch triggers rerender before pipeline IPC roundtrip syncs DOM to scratch

tests: hooks should be called in right order
skip_list.comment: useEffect order — BSI commit hook changes Preact's internal microtask/effect queue ordering, causing effects to fire in a different sequence than the test expects

tests: should correctly display DOM
should invoke layout effects after subtree is fully connected
skip_list.comment: useLayoutEffect DOM check — DOM content/connectivity assertion inside layout effect fires before main-thread patch IPC roundtrip completes

tests: should run layout affects after all refs are invoked
skip_list.comment: BSI ref + layout effect timing — ref.current contains BSI (background thread object), not DOM node; document.body.contains(ref.current) fails

tests: can access refs from within a layout effect callback
should have a right call order with correct dom ref
parent and child refs should be set before all effects
skip_list.comment: BSI refs in effect callbacks — tests read ref.current expecting DOM nodes (tagName, querySelector, etc.) but ref.current is BSI

tests: should not duplicate in lists where an item throws and the parent catches and returns a differing type
skip_list.comment: Error boundary with list diffing — pipeline timing causes extra mount/unmount cycles when error boundary catches during list reconciliation, duplicating items

tests: should clear falsy input values
should allow <input list /> to pass through as an attribute
nocompile_skip_list.comment: No-compile path lacks DOM IDL/property parity for these cases; compiled snapshot path already passes

tests: should set checked attribute on custom elements without checked property
should support false aria-* attributes
should re-render nested components
nocompile_skip_list.comment: Boolean-to-attribute serialization mismatch is no-compile specific; compiled mode already passes these tests

tests: should reorder Fragment children
nocompile_skip_list.comment: BSI .type field collision only reproduces in no-compile mode; compiled mode passes

tests: handles errors correctly
orders effects effectively
should cancel effects from a disposed render
should not rerun committed effects
should not schedule effects that have no change
nocompile_skip_list.comment: useEffect scheduling — BSI shim interaction with Preact's no-compile effect queue causes incorrect ordering/cancellation; compiled snapshot path already passes these

tests: should render functional components
should render components with props
should not serialize function props as attributes
should initialize props & context but not state in Component constructor
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler serializes event handlers as attributes (e.g. onbaz="2:0:onBaz") and changes render() return signature — tests assert on exact innerHTML or spy on render calls

tests: should render components
should render components that don't call Component constructor
should render components that don't call Component constructor and don't initialize state
should render components that don't inherit from Component
should render components that don't inherit from Component (unistore pattern)
should render components that don't inherit from Component and don't initialize state
should render components that don't pass args into the Component constructor (unistore pattern)
should render Component classes that don't pass args into the Component constructor
should render nested functional components
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler changes component render return value (snapshot type instead of raw vnode) — spy-based assertions on render() return value fail

tests: should be a VNode with a DOM node child
should be an array with multiple children
should be ignored when explicit children exist
should support passing children as a prop
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler transforms children into snapshot types — children.type becomes '__snapshot_xxx' instead of 'span', and spread children are serialized as JSON attributes instead of rendered

tests: should render sibling array children
should swap nested fragments correctly
should allow VNode reuse
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler wraps text in <wrapper> — DOM structure changes (childNodes count, serializeHtml output) beyond innerHTML patching

tests: should preserve state when moving keyed children components
should reorder child pairs
should retain state for inserted children
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler changes component identity — keyed children reorder/insert causes different mount/unmount cycles

tests: should keep value of uncontrolled checkboxes
should keep value of uncontrolled inputs
should not emit when value does not update
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler-generated snapshots don't set DOM IDL properties (value, checked) — these go through snapshot values array instead of direct dom[prop]=val

tests: should handle hole prepend
should handle hole replace
should handle hole insert
should handle hole apppend
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler changes component identity — keyed hole operations cause extra mount/unmount cycles due to snapshot type changes

tests: should be called when applying a DOM ref
should be called when unmounting a ref
should bubble up when ref throws on component that is not an error boundary
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiled mode ref attachment — snapshot create/ensureElements delays ref binding, causing ref-throwing error boundary tests to fire at wrong lifecycle phase

tests: returns an array containing a VNode with a DOM node child
returns an array with multiple children
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler transforms element VNodes into snapshot types — toChildArray result has type='__snapshot_xxx' instead of 'span', breaking type identity assertions

tests: should maintain focus when hydrating
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiled snapshot path sets input attributes via update[] functions — type attribute timing differs, causing input not to match expected type='text' during hydration focus test

tests: should reconcile mutated DOM attributes
should remove attributes on pre-existing DOM
permanent_skip_list.comment: Test mutates or pre-populates jsdom directly — BSI has no access to main-thread DOM state

tests: should support the <template> tag
permanent_skip_list.comment: BSI has no .content DocumentFragment — web-specific <template> API

tests: handle shuffled (stress test)
permanent_skip_list.comment: Exceeds 5s timeout due to pipeline overhead per commit

tests: should call getSnapshotBeforeUpdate before mutations are committed
permanent_skip_list.comment: Dual-thread gap — getSnapshotBeforeUpdate must read DOM before patch is applied, but background thread cannot observe main-thread DOM state; the pre-patch snapshot is structurally inaccessible

tests: should be invoked when dom does (DidMount, WillUnmount) or does not (WillMount, DidUnmount) exist
permanent_skip_list.comment: DOM existence in lifecycle hooks — test checks scratch.firstChild during componentWillMount (expects null) and componentWillUnmount (expects present), but pipeline's <page> element is always initialized before render

tests: should maintain context
permanent_skip_list.comment: TIMEOUT — requestAnimationFrame-driven context update conflicts with pipeline commit hook; the render loop never settles

tests: support render roots from an effect
permanent_skip_list.comment: TIMEOUT — creating a new render root inside useEffect conflicts with pipeline's single _lastScratch/_currentMtRoot global state, causing the effect to loop indefinitely

tests: should only register on* functions as handlers
should only register truthy values as handlers
should support native event names
should support camel-case event names
should update event handlers
should remove event handlers
should register events not appearing on dom nodes
should use capturing for event props ending with *Capture
should support both capturing and non-capturing events on the same element
should support (got|lost)PointerCapture events
should support camel-case focus event names
permanent_skip_list.comment: Event registration tests — spy on DOM element.addEventListener but BSI event stubs register on the background thread and never reach jsdom. Lynx has its own event model separate from the Web DOM event system.

tests: should maintain focus when moving the input around
should maintain focus when adding children around input
should maintain focus when adding children around input (unkeyed)
should maintain focus when conditional elements around input
should maintain focus when removing elements around input
should  maintain focus when removing element directly before input
should maintain focus when adding input next to the current input
should keep focus in Fragments
should keep text selection
permanent_skip_list.comment: Focus/selection DOM APIs — element.focus() and setSelectionRange require browser-level focus management which is absent in the Lynx dual-thread pipeline. Lynx has its own focus model.
